channel.title: Go Humble! RSS GAMES
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: Squad Goals
item.content:encoded:
Grab a friend or two and cozy up with the Squad Goals Bundle, an epic collection of co-op titles perfect for staying connected with your bestie this summer. Use your Turtle Power to rescue Master Splinter from the evil Foot Clan in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Splintered Fate, a rad roguelike with endless replayability that comes packed with the Metalhead DLC! Or race against the clock to get dishes out hot in PlateUp!, a fast-paced restaurant management sim! Pay what you want for eight amazing co-op games and help support Child's Play when you shop with Humble!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before January 31st, 2027.

item.title: Narrative 12 for $10 Bundle
item.description: Be a part of the story
item.content:encoded:
Fighting boss battles and journeying through open worlds is fun and all, but sometimes all a great game needs is a great story worth immersing ourselves in for a few hours. Get 12 games for $10 in this bundle full of tales of all genres, from hard boiled detective yarns with a retro spin to atmospheric mysteries about missing families. Search for clues through your empty childhood house in Gone Home. Tend your homestead and try not to think about the increasingly disturbing letters you get in the mail in The Stillness of the Wind. Join an occult detective in the kinda-haunted city of Twin Lakes in The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark. There are even more great stories to experience in this bundle, so grab these games now for just $10, and support mental health charity Take This with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 31st, 2027.

item.title: Summer Games Done Quick 2026
item.content:encoded:
We love to take our time savoring a great game, but we also love the high-octane thrill of speedrunning our way to the end. If you’re also one of those people, and you’re looking forward to speedrunning marathon Summer Games Done Quick 2026, now’s the time to dive into some prep work with some of the games featured at the event! In this bundle you’ll find games like Solar Ash, a stylized action-adventure game full of gravity-defying challenges and thrilling boss battles! Or take on Bomb Rush Cyberfunk, a thrill ride on wheels that’s just as groovy as its title suggests! Or grab a friend and enjoy the Mega Man-inspired action of roguelike co-op 20XX! There’s even more to explore in this bundle celebrating Summer Games Done Quick 2026, so grab it now and grab it fast, and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem Grandma, No! and The Gunk before January 24th, 2027. Redeem all others before July 24th, 2027

item.title: Let's Go Gambling!...aw dang it.
item.content:encoded:
Spin the wheel, chuck the dice, and win big in our latest bundle focused on tipping the odds in your favor. Combine strategy and chaos as best you can while you navigate through Dicealot’s risky engagements, build multiple winning hands in This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker, or even alter probability itself in Pip My Dice. These tempting tales, plus five more await you, and you’ll be supporting Movember with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 22nd, 2027.

item.title: Arc System Works: Evo Collection
item.description: Play Fighting Games. Fight for Something Bigger.
item.content:encoded:
What’s better than getting a collection of fighting games from Arc System Works in celebration of Evo 2026? Supporting the fight against rare disease while you’re at it. Throw hands in style with big-time fighting games that dominate the competitive scene. Dive into an epic bundle of Guilty Gear titles highlighted by the dynamic 2D x 3D hybrid Guilty Gear -STRIVE-, alongside all five available Season Passes. Or challenge your skills in competitive staples like BlazBlue: Central Fiction and Under Night In-Birth II. Your bundle purchase supports the Raiden Science Foundation and its Fight4Rare initiative, helping ignite hope and advance rare disease treatment and research.

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 17th, 2027.

item.title: Going Rogue: A Lite Heavy Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Dive into adventure and mystery with this bundle of roguelike and roguelite action games! Make a deal with a demon to exact revenge on your murderer in Brutal Orchestra! Survive a decaying spaceship full of killer monsters in the procedurally generated deep space purgatory of Moros Protocol! Take on the adventures and challenges of these roguelikes and more in this bundle, and support Team Rubicon with your purchase at the price of your choice!

Keys expire. Please redeem Moros Protocol before January 15th, 2027 and remaining titles before July 15th, 2027.

item.title: Upload VR Summer 2026
item.content:encoded:
Freshen up your VR collection with an epic bundle of titles perfect for any platform. Jump into the cockpit of a wide variety of aircraft in VTOL VR, a near-futuristic combat flight game built to get your heart pumping! Brave Metro Awakening, a story-driven VR adventure that blends exploration and FPS gameplay to deliver a completely immersive experience. Or get a lil’ strange with Among Us 3D, a new twist on the original game’s formula that drops you into chaos! Step out of reality and into a world of savings—plus, your purchase helps support Kiss the Ground!

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 8th, 2027.
